title: Automatically fill a column with the board name

posts.author: chrislaine (CHRISTEL LAINE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !
I’d like to automatically fill a column with the board name… So all the items will have the same text in this column, but I don’t want to do it my self, i want an automatisation…
Because when I copy item’s board in a new board, I want the native board name to be known…
Thanks for your help !!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @chrislaine - you can use General Caster to complete this as they have a Board Name option that you can use to populate a text column.

Thanks,
Mark

posts.author: JheZika (James Henrique dos Santos Claudino)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @chrislaine - you can use a column of STATUS for filled automatically. Forever which create an item name will changed collumn of STATUS.
